parameters.command: ={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && python -c "from processors.planner import Planner; import json; p = Planner(); print(json.dumps(p.execute()))" 2>/dev/null | tee /tmp/step0_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step0_out.txt' }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify({topic: ($json.proposed_topic || ''), type: ($json.proposed_content_type || ''), angle: ($json.proposed_angle || ''), games: (($json.game_slugs || []).join(', ')), reasoning: ($json.reasoning || ''), budget: ($json.budget_status || '')})) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 0 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && python -m pipeline.update_gate_post --post-id ' + ($('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.post_id || 'none') + ' --gate ' + String($('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.gate || 0) + ' --action approve --user ' + JSON.stringify($('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.user_name || '') }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python scripts/fetch_game_data.py 2>/dev/null | tee /tmp/step1_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' /tmp/step1_out.txt' }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify({count: String($json.game_count || 0), type: ($json.content_type || ''), topic: ($json.topic || '')}) ) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 1 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python scripts/generate_script.py 2>/dev/null | tee /tmp/step2_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' /tmp/step2_out.txt' }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && python scripts/validate_script.py --script-id ' + $json.script_id + ' 2>/dev/null | tee /tmp/step3_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step3_out.txt' }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && ' + (() => { const overall = ($json.overall_score || 0); const scriptText = ($('Parse Script').first().json.script_text || '').substring(0, 3000); const data = { Score: String(overall) + '/100', script_body: scriptText }; return 'echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(data)) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 2 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id; })() }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python scripts/generate_metadata.py --script-id $SCRIPT_ID 2>/dev/null | tee /tmp/step4_meta_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' /tmp/step4_meta_out.txt' }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python scripts/generate_voiceover.py --script-id $SCRIPT_ID 2>/dev/null | tee /tmp/step5_vo_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ' /tmp/step5_vo_out.txt' }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify({duration: String($json.duration || 0) + 's', file_path: ($json.file_path || '')})) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 3 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id + ' --file-paths ' + ($json.file_path || '') }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $('Parse Gate Approval').first().json.run_id + ') && python scripts/update_rag.py --script-id $SCRIPT_ID 2>/dev/null' }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { success: true, message: "✅ YouTube pipeline complete." } }];

parameters.command: ={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && python -m pipeline.update_gate_post --post-id ' + ($json.post_id || 'none') + ' --gate ' + String($json.gate || 0) + ' --action reject --user ' + JSON.stringify($json.user_name || '') }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && python -m pipeline.comment_handler --run-id ' + ($json.run_id || 'unknown') + ' --gate ' + String($json.gate || 0) + ' --comment ' + JSON.stringify($json.comment || 'no comment') + ' 2>/dev/null' }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && ' + (() => { const d = $json; const data = { Score: String(d.overall_score || 0) + '/100', script_body: (d.script_text || '').substring(0, 3000) }; return 'echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(data)) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 2 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + (d.run_id || ''); })() }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: "comment_rewrite_failed", message: "Generation failed - notification already sent." } }];

parameters.command: ={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && eval $(python3 -m pipeline.read_state ' + $json.run_id + ') && python scripts/generate_script.py 2>/dev/null | tee /tmp/step2_retry_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step2_retry_out.txt' }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && python scripts/validate_script.py --script-id ' + $json.script_id + ' 2>/dev/null | tee /tmp/step3_retry_out.txt && python3 -m pipeline.save_state ' + $json.run_id + ' /tmp/step3_retry_out.txt' }}

={{ 'set -a && source /home/node/youtube_stack/.env && set +a && cd /home/node/youtube_stack && ' + (() => { const overall = ($json.overall_score || 0); const scriptText = ($('Parse Retry Script').first().json.script_text || '').substring(0, 3000); const data = { Score: String(overall) + '/100', script_body: scriptText }; return 'echo ' + JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(data)) + ' > /tmp/gate_data.json && python -m pipeline.gate_helper --gate 2 --data-file /tmp/gate_data.json --run-id ' + $json.run_id; })() }}
